steps.title: Read the graph features
steps.content: The line of best fit rises from left to right, so it has a positive slope. It also passes close to the origin, so the $y$-intercept is close to $0$.

steps.title: Match the equation
steps.content: The horizontal choices have slope $0$, and the negative-slope choice falls from left to right. The only equation with a positive slope and intercept near $0$ is $y=1.1x$. The answer is A.
